hypothesis: Integrating a persistent, structured semantic memory encoding force-field ontologies (term definitions, units, and allowed cross terms) into the Research Team will raise the Intersection-over-Union of parameter extraction for nonstandard-formatted papers (e.g., EPM2 and TraPPE‑zeo) to at least 0.90 and reduce wrong-value assignments by ≥50% across five repeated runs relative to the current baseline.
